title: lastrea maranguensis
intro: Lastrea maranguensis, also known as the Marangu fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a type of epiphytic fern found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea maranguensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
